description: Career workflow assistant for structured career planning, job matching notes, and application task support.

actions.label: View project status
actions.description: Review the local PROJECT_STATUS.md checkpoint file.
actions.command_template: Open PROJECT_STATUS.md in the project folder.
actions.expected_output: User can see the current checkpoint, validation status, and next stage.
actions.safety_note: Display/manual metadata only; AgentHub does not execute this action.

actions.label: View agent manifest
actions.description: Review the local agent_manifest.json metadata file.
actions.command_template: Open agent_manifest.json in the project folder.
actions.expected_output: User can inspect declared inputs, outputs, actions, connectors, and safety mode.
actions.safety_note: Display/manual metadata only; AgentHub does not execute this action.

actions.label: Open project folder
actions.description: Open the local project folder manually outside AgentHub.
actions.expected_output: User manually opens the local project folder.
actions.safety_note: Display/manual metadata only; AgentHub does not execute this action.

actions.label: Manual run dashboard
actions.description: Show the manual dashboard launch runbook for the Agent.
actions.expected_output: User manually opens the local Streamlit dashboard outside automated execution.
actions.safety_note: Display/manual metadata only; AgentHub does not execute this action.

actions.label: Generate Codex prompt
actions.description: Generate a copyable Codex prompt for the next safe project task.
actions.command_template: Copy the Agent metadata into the next Codex task prompt.
actions.expected_output: A copyable prompt template for the next safe Codex task.
actions.safety_note: Prompt is for manual copy into Codex; it does not execute project code.

next_recommended_action: Keep paused after public showcase and profile pin; review only from AgentHub.
